Catalog/Diagnostics/CliniQuant PRO
DiagnosticsREF: MRL-DGN-001

CliniQuant PRO

CliniQuant · Biochemistry Analyzers

CliniQuant PRO is an advanced clinical chemistry analyzer designed for high-precision diagnostic testing in hospitals and laboratories. This state-of-the-art system features bichromatic measurement mode with 670nm filter wavelength, minimal 32µL reaction volume, and 200 programmable channels for comprehensive biochemical analysis. Equipped with Peltier temperature control elements and 4 incubator positions, it ensures accurate and reliable results for critical patient diagnostics and laboratory workflow optimization.

MaterialElectronic components with optical system
Frequently Asked Questions

CliniQuant PRO is an advanced clinical chemistry analyzer designed for high-precision diagnostic testing in hospitals and laboratories. This state-of-the-art system features bichromatic measurement mode with 670nm filter wavelength, minimal 32µL reaction volume, and 200 programmable channels for comprehensive biochemical analysis. Equipped with Peltier temperature control elements and 4 incubator positions, it ensures accurate and reliable results for critical patient diagnostics and laboratory workflow optimization.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the CliniQuant PRO, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The CliniQuant PRO is constructed using Electronic components with optical system, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
